entities.name: SORGHUM VARIETY S 35
entities.description: A pure line sorghum variety developed by ICRISAT and released in Cameroon and Chad

entities.name: CAMEROON
entities.description: A country in Africa where sorghum variety S 35 was released and adopted

entities.name: CHAD
entities.description: A country in Africa where sorghum variety S 35 was released and adopted

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the ICRISAT breeding program developed sorghum variety S 35

entities.name: NIGERIA
entities.description: The country where sorghum variety S 35 was advanced before release in other African countries

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain output produced per unit area

entities.name: UNIT PRODUCTION COST
entities.description: The cost incurred to produce a unit of the crop

entities.name: RESEARCH SPILLOVER
entities.description: The phenomenon where research conducted in one location impacts other regions

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: The systematic process of developing improved crop varieties

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The broad agroecological region where parental materials were distributed

entities.name: RAINFED
entities.description: Agricultural conditions where crops rely solely on rainfall for moisture

entities.name: NET PRESENT VALUE
entities.description: A financial measure used to estimate the total benefit of research spillovers

entities.name: INTERNAL RATE OF RETURN
entities.description: A metric used to evaluate the profitability of research investments

entities.name: MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: The agricultural techniques used to optimize the growth of a specific variety
